entries.title: TUGORES (so)
entries.description: Predio en la isla de Mallorca, prov., aud. terr. y c. g. de Baleares, part. jud., térm. y jurisd. de la c. de Palma.
entries.note: Recovered 2026-05-22 by inner_lemma_audit.py: buried after the 'V. Toya' cross-references TUGIA and TLCIENSIS SALTUS in chocr leaf 15/185.
